worker_attempts.visible_answer:
You're very welcome, Wei! I'm glad I could help clarify the situation for you. 

To summarize:
- ✅ Your **Bronze** and **Gold** referral bonuses were successfully processed
- ⏳ Your **Silver** referral is still in progress — keep an eye on that one
- ❌ The **Platinum** referral was unfortunately lost due to the timing limit

For future referrals, just remember the **2 bonuses per rolling 7-day window** rule, and you'll be all set!

If you have any other questions about your account or the referral program, don't hesitate to reach out. Have a great day! 😊
